# Experiment: <name>

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Owner:** <who reviews the result>

**Hypothesis:** <what you believe and why, in one sentence>

**Metric:** <the single number that moves if the hypothesis holds>
**Baseline:** <current value, with the window it was measured over>
**Expected effect:** <direction and rough size, pre-registered before shipping>

**Review date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Decision rule:** <ship / revert / iterate, as a threshold on the metric, stated before you look>

## Result (filled at review)

<Observed value. Decision taken per the rule above. No post-hoc goalposts.>
